hero.description: We centralize the career history, stats, data and media of every player and agency into a web portfolio with its own link, optimized for SEO. We're building the world's reference platform — starting with LATAM and Spain.
hero.imageAlt: The 'BallersHub team during a scouting day

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: Turn every footballer —professional, semi-professional or amateur— and every agency into a professional web portfolio: a single link where they centralize career history, stats, data and media to sell themselves and drive their career online.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To be the number one page in the world where footballers present themselves, show their data and achieve their goals. The global reference when a club, journalist or scout looks for talent — at any competitive level.

objectives.title: Objectives
objectives.description: Start with LATAM and Spain and scale to global markets. So any footballer or agency can sell themselves online with a scalable, SEO-ready portfolio, with verified reviews (coming beta) and connected to a future active scouting network.

audiencesHeader.description: The product is designed so the player is the protagonist, agencies scale their roster, and the ecosystem (clubs, community and press) discovers talent with real data.

players.title: Players and athletes
players.subtitle: Primary audience — the protagonist
players.description: You're the center of the platform. Professional, semi-professional or amateur: build your portfolio in minutes and start selling yourself with your own link, ready to share.
bullets: Career history, stats and physical data centralized
A single link optimized for SEO

agencies.title: Agencies and agents
agencies.subtitle: Ally persona — they scale their roster
agencies.description: Showcase the full roster of players you represent with a professional site, your own identity and consolidated data. Position yourself online as a serious agency.

clubs.title: Professional clubs
clubs.subtitle: Looking for real talent
clubs.description: Sporting departments and coaching staff that filter candidates by position, age, metrics and availability — with verified data, not rumors.

fans.title: Community and fans
fans.subtitle: Following careers closely
fans.description: Football belongs to the people. Fans who want to know each player's full career, history and numbers — without editorial filters.

journalists.title: Sports journalists
journalists.subtitle: Coverage backed by data
journalists.description: A reliable, always up-to-date source for investigations, articles and coverage — with stats, career history and verifiable references one link away.

ownLink.title: Your own link to sell yourself
ownLink.description: Every player and every agency has a unique URL. Share it via WhatsApp, email or social media and open the door to clubs and agents.

seo.title: Optimized for SEO
seo.description: Built to show up on Google when someone searches your name, your position or your club. Your portfolio works for you 24/7.

centralized.title: Your whole career, centralized
centralized.description: Career history, stats, physical data and media (photos, clips, matches) in one place — easy to maintain, ready to present.

reviews.title: Verified reviews
reviews.description: Reviews signed by verified accounts (coaching staff, scouts, former teammates) that back your track record. Coming beta.

agencies.title: Built for agencies
agencies.description: Add your full roster of players, show consolidated data and position your agency's identity with a professional site.

scouting.title: Scouting network (coming)
scouting.description: A living database where clubs and scouts discover talent by real filters: position, age, metrics and availability.

start.title: The project begins
start.description: We spotted the same problem in players and agencies: PDF profiles, broken YouTube video links, informal social media. No professional portfolio with its own identity. We decided to build the solution.

prototype.title: First portfolio prototype
prototype.description: We built the first version of the product: a portfolio with a unique link, career, physical data and media upload. Internal testing with nearby players and agencies.

beta.title: Closed beta · pilots in LATAM + Spain
beta.description: We validated the product with a small group of pilot players and agencies in Latin America and Spain. Every portfolio is born SEO-optimized and ready to share with its own link.

launch.title: Official launch
launch.description: Public opening for players and agencies in LATAM and Spain. Free access to the portfolio with a unique link, centralized data and online positioning from day one.

next.title: Verified reviews + global scouting network
next.description: Reviews signed by verified accounts (coaching staff, scouts, former teammates) and an active database where clubs discover talent by position, age and metrics. The road to being the #1 page in the world.

projectStart.label: Project start
projectStart.description: 8 months building with pilot players and agencies.

launch.label: Official launch
launch.description: Public opening in LATAM and Spain with SEO from day 1.

seo.label: SEO-optimized
seo.description: Every portfolio is born ready to show up on Google.

reviews.label: Verified reviews
reviews.description: Reviews signed by verified accounts — coming soon.

julian.bio: Professional footballer, creator and developer of 'BallersHub. He experienced first-hand the lack of a serious platform for a player to sell themselves professionally — so he decided to build it. He combines pitch, code and product so every portfolio feels made by someone who understands the sport from the inside.

validation.name: Validation team
validation.bio: Active players, former players and analysts who verify every profile and guide players and agencies as they join. They can tell real data from inflated data, keep the network's quality high, and give human support at every step: assisted onboarding and fast responses.

cta.title: Your portfolio. Your link. Your career.
cta.description: Centralize your career history, show your data and position yourself online. For players who want to sell themselves professionally and for agencies that want to scale their identity.

meta.title: About
meta.description: Meet the team, mission, vision and values behind 'BallersHub: the hub where football talent gains real, verified visibility.

missionVision.description: Mission, vision and objectives aren't words on a wall: they're the filter we use to decide what to build, what to prioritize and how to support players and agencies.

values.description: It's not another player PDF. It's a platform designed so your career or your agency sells itself professionally online — with its own identity, centralized data and a real connection to the ecosystem.

impact.description: We built quietly for 8 months with pilot players and agencies. In June 2026 we open the platform for LATAM and Spain.

story.titlePlain: From an idea on the pitch to a network
story.description: Every milestone is marked by real community feedback. We iterate fast, listen first and build for the long term.

team.description: We're not an office team watching football from the outside. We're active players, former players and analysts who understand what a footballer needs to sell themselves — because we've lived it firsthand.
